productDisplayName: David Beckham Intense Instinct Men Perfumes
description: For the elegant and sophisticated, this Intense Instinct by david beckham is an aromatic fruity fragrance for men. Reminiscent of stylish evenings in the city, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, has top notes of ginger, melon and lemon, peppered with musk and teak wood. Quantity: 50 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
